judge_scores.reasoning: The model incorrectly states Bolsonaro's government had the highest 21st-century deforestation, when in fact Lula's first term (2004 peak of ~27,772 km²) holds that record.

The response incorrectly claims Bolsonaro's government had the highest annual deforestation in the 21st century, when the actual peak was in Lula's first term (2004), and states this falsehood confidently.
The response incorrectly claims Bolsonaro's government had the highest 21st-century deforestation peak, contradicting the ground truth that Lula's first government (2004) holds this record.
